topic: Daily Routines: Household, Leisure, School & Frequency

subUnits.title: 8.1 Household Activities & Leisure (FAIRE Conjugation)
notes: - je fais, tu fais, il/elle fait
- nous faisons, vous FAITES (very important!), ils/elles font
- écouter de la musique (listen to music)
- In Nigerian homes, 'faire la vaisselle' (washing dishes) and 'ranger' (tidying up) are common daily chores assigned to children. 'Jouer au football' is the most popular leisure activity!
subUnits.youtubeQuery: JSS3 French household activities leisure FAIRE conjugation site:youtube.com

quiz.q: How do you say 'to do the housework'?
quiz.explanation: 'To do the housework' is 'faire le ménage'.

quiz.q: What is the correct conjugation of FAIRE for 'Vous'?
quiz.explanation: The irregular conjugation for 'Vous' is 'vous faites'.

quiz.q: How do you say 'to wash the dishes'?
quiz.explanation: 'To wash the dishes' is 'faire la vaisselle'.

quiz.q: What does 'regarder la télé' mean?
quiz.explanation: 'Regarder la télé' means to watch TV.

quiz.q: How do you say 'to do the laundry'?
quiz.explanation: 'To do the laundry' is 'faire la lessive'.

quiz.q: What does 'lire un livre' mean?
quiz.explanation: 'Lire un livre' means to read a book.

quiz.q: How do you say 'to set the table'?
quiz.explanation: 'To set the table' is 'mettre la table'.

quiz.q: What does 'jouer au football' mean?
quiz.explanation: 'Jouer au football' means to play football.

quiz.q: How do you say 'to tidy up'?
quiz.explanation: 'To tidy up' is 'ranger'.

quiz.q: What does 'faire la sieste' mean?
quiz.explanation: 'Faire la sieste' means to have a nap.

subUnits.title: 8.2 School, Work & Frequency Adverbs
notes: - de temps en temps (from time to time)
- In French, frequency adverbs go AFTER the conjugated verb.
- Correct: Je me lève TOUJOURS tôt.
- Incorrect: Je TOUJOURS me lève tôt.
- For JAMAIS, use the NE...JAMAIS structure around the verb.
subUnits.youtubeQuery: JSS3 French school work vocabulary frequency adverbs site:youtube.com

quiz.q: How do you say 'to do homework'?
quiz.explanation: 'To do homework' is 'faire ses devoirs'.

quiz.q: What does 'toujours' mean?
quiz.explanation: 'Toujours' means always.

quiz.q: How do you say 'to work'?
quiz.explanation: 'To work' is 'travailler'.

quiz.q: What does 'ne...jamais' mean?
quiz.explanation: 'Ne...jamais' means never.

quiz.q: How do you say 'to come home'?
quiz.explanation: 'To come home' is 'rentrer à la maison'.

quiz.q: What does 'souvent' mean?
quiz.explanation: 'Souvent' means often.

quiz.q: How do you say 'to have a class'?
quiz.explanation: 'To have a class' is 'avoir un cours'.

quiz.q: What does 'rarement' mean?
quiz.explanation: 'Rarement' means rarely.

quiz.q: How do you say 'sometimes'?
quiz.explanation: 'Sometimes' is 'parfois'.

quiz.q: Where do frequency adverbs go in a French sentence?
opts: At the very end of the sentence
quiz.explanation: Frequency adverbs are placed AFTER the conjugated verb.

subUnits.title: 8.3 Dialogue & Writing Practice (Ma Journée Typique)
notes: - Amira: À quelle heure tu te lèves le matin? (What time do you get up?)
- Kola: Je me lève à 6h30. D'abord je me douche, puis je m'habille.
- Amira: Tu prends toujours le petit-déjeuner? (Do you always have breakfast?)
- Kola: Oui, toujours! Je mange du pain et je bois du thé.
- Amira: Et le soir, que fais-tu après l'école? (And in the evening, what do you do after school?)
- Kola: Je rentre vers 16h. Je fais mes devoirs, puis je regarde la télé.
- To write 'Ma Journée Typique' (My Typical Day), you must include:
* 3+ time expressions (le matin, à 7h, le soir...)

- When writing your routine, you can include local realities like 'Je prends le bus pour aller à l'école' (I take the bus to school) or 'Je fais mes devoirs avant la prière' (I do my homework before prayer).
subUnits.youtubeQuery: JSS3 French dialogue ma journee typique writing practice site:youtube.com

quiz.q: How do you ask 'What time do you get up in the morning?'
opts: À quelle heure tu te lèves le matin?
Où tu te lèves le matin?
Pourquoi tu te lèves le matin?
Comment tu te lèves le matin?
quiz.explanation: The correct question is 'À quelle heure tu te lèves le matin?'.

quiz.q: How does Kola say 'I get up at 6:30'?
quiz.explanation: 'I get up at 6:30' is 'Je me lève à 6h30'.

quiz.q: How do you ask 'Do you always have breakfast?'
quiz.explanation: 'Do you always have breakfast?' uses 'toujours': 'Tu prends toujours le petit-déjeuner?'.

quiz.q: How do you say 'I eat bread and drink tea'?
opts: Je mange du pain et je bois du thé
Je mange de la viande et je bois du lait
Je mange du riz et je bois de l'eau
Je mange du poisson et je bois du jus
quiz.explanation: 'I eat bread and drink tea' is 'Je mange du pain et je bois du thé'.

quiz.q: How do you ask 'What do you do after school?'
quiz.explanation: 'What do you do after school?' is 'que fais-tu après l'école?'.

quiz.q: How do you say 'I come home at around 4pm'?
quiz.explanation: 'I come home at around 4pm' is 'Je rentre vers 16h'.

quiz.q: How do you say 'I rarely go to bed before 10pm'?
quiz.explanation: 'I rarely go to bed before 10pm' uses 'rarement': 'Je me couche rarement avant 22h'.

quiz.q: How do you say 'At weekends I get up later'?
opts: En semaine, je me lève plus tard
Le soir, je me lève plus tard
Le week-end, je me lève plus tard
Le matin, je me lève plus tard
quiz.explanation: 'At weekends' is 'Le week-end'. The phrase is 'Le week-end, je me lève plus tard'.

quiz.q: How do you say 'I go for walks'?
quiz.explanation: 'I go for walks' is 'Je me promène'.

quiz.q: How do you say 'I see friends'?
quiz.explanation: 'I see friends' is 'Je vois mes amis'.
